mldsa-native source snapshot
============================

Source: https://github.com/pq-code-package/mldsa-native

Acquisition method:
- `git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/pq-code-package/mldsa-native.git`
- nested `.git` metadata removed after vendoring

Notes:
- This tree is the selected maintained C upstream for ML-DSA.
- The project README states that `mldsa-native` is a fork of the ML-DSA reference implementation.
- License information remains in the vendored upstream files.
